opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like there is crushed glass under my eyelids, they are burning uncontrollably, and the light in the room is agonizing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My left eye suddenly became really painful and gritty tonight while I was reading near a fan, it's watering non-stop and I can't keep it open — I'm scared something is seriously wrong or I'm going blind.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly this evening while reading in front of a fan
symptom_narrative.character: intense stinging, burning, foreign-body 'crushed glass' feeling on the surface of the eye, with non-stop watering
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonizing — I can't keep the eye open at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mainly the left eye, on the surface
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; I ran out of my eye drops yesterday
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any light is unbearable, and trying to open the eye
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lots of reflex tearing and extreme sensitivity to light; I'm wearing sunglasses inside
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had gritty, mildly light-sensitive eyes on and off with my thyroid condition, but never this bad or this sudden
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't read or look at screens; visually limited tonight because of the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: autoimmune thyroid condition, which I'm told is controlled
past_medical_history.how_managed: monitored by my GP; I've been told it affects my eyes a bit

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was reading at home in the evening with an overhead fan blowing air onto the face when the symptoms started

objective_data_offered.value: left eye looks red and is watering heavily; patient is squinting, holding a tissue to the eye and wearing sunglasses indoors because of the light
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-view over camera in poor lighting; the patient cannot hold the painful eye open for a clear look

objective_data_offered.value: an overhead fan was blowing air directly onto the patient's face while reading
